note: Advisory sandbox validator. CHECK_OK/INVALID vocab, never PASS.
title: In-library CHESS pass validator CLI

subject.method: dependency-free schema-driven validation; standalone, no downstream consumer (BR-3 not gated by it)

what_it_proves: canonical sample CHESS pass validates against the schema -> CHECK_OK exit 0
our own locked build-plan chess_pass also validates (real generated data)
action=BLOCK rejected by BOTH the enum and the manifest forbidden_action_labels (no-BLOCK teeth)
manifest-check surfaces the dangling TOOLS/ refs

findings_for_founder.note: manifest lists these but they are absent (the real CLI lives at scripts/chess_pass_cli_v1.py). REPORTED, not fixed — manifest edit is a founder/append-only decision, not a sandbox cleanup.

chess_patches_applied: stays a standalone library-internal validator; nothing downstream depends on it
exits nonzero on invalid/forbidden/dangling; RED-before-GREEN via canary
read-only; reports dangling refs, does not edit the manifest (append-only)
